title: Public patch export upstream-readiness audit
scope: audit only; do not rewrite or submit patches yet

findings.issue: vendor pinmux property remains in exported DTS patches
findings.required_action_before_submission: Drop allwinner,pinmux and keep only upstream pinctrl binding properties such as function, drive-strength, and bias settings.

findings.issue: MMC compatible binding patch is separate
findings.evidence: patches/0001-dt-bindings-mmc-add-Allwinner-A733-compatible.patch adds allwinner,sun60i-a733-mmc independently of the DTSI patch.
findings.required_action_before_submission: Decide during the next intentional export whether this remains standalone or is folded into the minimal SoC support flow, depending on maintainer/dependency feedback.

findings.evidence: The public cover letter and status docs explicitly exclude Ethernet, VPU/Cedrus, display, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, USB-C, PCIe, and other board features.

decision: No patch rewrite in H080. Queue these as required fixups before any next public series export.
next_action: Wait for the IDMAC reply or, if moving on the DTS-only submission path, regenerate a clean minimal series without vendor pinmux properties and with CCU/pinctrl RFC dependencies stated.
